Why 6ix Keys?

Skip The Dealer

Dealerships charge $400–$700 for a car key replacement. Then they make you wait 3–5 days and tow your car in. That's their problem, not yours.

With 6ix Keys, Kobe rolls to you — home, office, parking lot — cuts and programs your key on-site in under an hour. Half the price. Zero hassle.

✓
No tow truck required
✓
Same-day service, GTA-wide
✓
Flat-rate quotes upfront — no surprises
✓
All major makes & models supported
✓
Mamba Mentality — we always show up

What We Do

Our Services

Every service is mobile. We come to you — on-site, same day, no dealership needed.

🔑

Car Key Replacement

Lost all your keys? Need a spare? We cut and program a new key for your vehicle right at your location. Works with your car's immobilizer — no dealer required.

Starting at $100 — quoted before we start
📡

Smart Key Programming

Push-button start, proximity entry, keyless smart keys — we program them all on-site for BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Toyota, Honda, Ford, and more.

Starting at $150 — all major brands
📟

Transponder Chip Keys

Transponder keys have an embedded chip that communicates with your car's ECU. We cut the blade and program the chip — all in one shot, at your location.

Starting at $150 — on-site programming
🏢

Condo Fob Duplication

Need an extra building fob? We duplicate most condo fobs and access cards on the spot. We come to your building — no property manager needed for most jobs.

$10 at our location  |  $10 + $40 service charge if we come to you
🚗

Garage Remote Cloning

Lost or need a spare garage remote? We clone or program most garage door remotes. Compatible with LiftMaster, Chamberlain, Genie, Marantec, and more.

$40 at our location  |  $40 + $40 service charge if we come to you
🔓

Key Fob Remote Repair

Worn out buttons? Dead fob after water damage? We repair and refurbish key fob remotes for most vehicles — faster and cheaper than buying a new fob.

Call for quote — most fobs supported

Check Engine Light Diagnostic Scan

Check engine light on? We come to you with professional OBD2 diagnostic equipment to read trouble codes, explain what they mean, and clear them. Most cars 1996+ supported. 15-30 minute on-site service.

$50 flat rate — full code report

BMW / Audi Coding & Feature Unlock

Unlock hidden features your car already has but the dealer charges thousands for. One session, unlimited features. Auto-fold mirrors, sport display, lap timer, video in motion, comfort blinkers, digital speed, welcome lights, and more. BMW F/G chassis and Audi MQB/MLB supported.

$100 per session — unlimited features
Mobile GTA Service
Car Keys + Fobs

We Come To You.

Smart Key Programming

Luxury Keys.
Real Price.

BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Toyota, Honda, Ford, Kia — we program smart keys and push-button fobs for all major brands. Same technology as the dealership at half the cost.

No need to tow it in. We come to where the car is sitting and program it right there.

📞 Call Kobe
BMW · Mercedes · Audi

Premium Brands.
No Problem.

Luxury vehicles need precision. We carry professional-grade programming equipment for high-security keys — encrypted transponders, proximity fobs, and all-keys-lost scenarios.

No guessing. No trial and error. We do this every day. Call Kobe for a straight quote.

How It Works

Simple. Fast. Done.

Four steps and your key problem is solved — no tow truck, no waiting room.

01
📞

Call Kobe

Tell us your year, make, model, and the issue. We give you a firm quote right away — no runaround, no games.

02
🚗

We Come To You

We roll out to your location — home, work, parking lot, wherever the car is sitting. No tow needed, ever.

03
✅

Key Made On-Site

Your key is cut and programmed right there in the driveway or parking lot. You drive away. That's it.

04
💰

Pay Flat Rate

The quote we gave you is what you pay. No hidden fees, no dealer markup. Cash, card, tap, e-transfer — all accepted.

Payments

Easy & Secure Payment

Multiple ways to pay — whatever works best for you. All payments safe and secure.

💳

Credit / Debit Card

Visa, Mastercard, Amex — tap or insert. We bring a wireless card reader to every single job.

Accepted On-Site
📱

Apple Pay / Google Pay

Tap to pay with your phone or watch. Fast, secure, contactless — no card needed.

Tap & Go
🏦

Interac e-Transfer

Send payment directly from your bank. Quick and fee-free. Email kobee.b@gmail.com.

Instant Transfer
💵

Cash

Good old-fashioned cash always works. We'll provide a receipt on request. No issues.

Always Accepted

🔒 All card payments processed securely via Stripe — industry-standard encryption. We never store your card information.

Key Tips & Info

Know Your Options

Fast answers to common key and fob questions across the GTA.

Car Keys

On-Site Car Key Replacement — No Tow Required

Lost your car keys and need a new set immediately? With our on-site service, we come to you — cutting and programming a new key right where you are. No tow, no dealership, no days of waiting.

📞 Call Kobe For A Quote →
Condo Fobs

Condo Fob Duplication Across Toronto & GTA — $10 Flat

Need a condo fob copy? $10 flat. Our mobile service covers Toronto and surrounding areas. We arrive at your location equipped to duplicate most fobs swiftly — no wait, no property manager needed.

💬 Text A Photo →
Smart Keys

Smart Key Programming for All Major Brands

We offer on-site smart key programming for all major vehicle brands including BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Toyota, and Honda. Professional equipment, same as the dealer — half the price.

📞 Book Today →
Transponder Keys

Transponder Chip Programming — Done On-Site

Transponder keys require special equipment to program. Our team handles this technology on-site, ensuring your key communicates correctly with your car — no dealer trip, no dealer bill.

📞 Get A Quote →
Garage Remotes

Garage Remote Cloning — $40 Flat

Lost or need a spare garage remote? We clone or program most garage door remotes for $40. Works with LiftMaster, Chamberlain, Genie, Marantec, and more. Fast, mobile, and we come to you.

📞 Book Now →

FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know before calling Kobe.

Prices vary by make and model, but most replacements range from $150–$350 — compared to $400–$700 at the dealership. Condo fobs are $10 flat. Garage remotes are $40 flat. We give you a firm quote before we start. No surprises, ever.
No. We come to you — home, office, parking lot, wherever the car is sitting. All our equipment is mobile. No tow truck needed in the vast majority of cases. If something unusual comes up, we'll let you know before any work starts.
Honda, Toyota, Ford, GM, Chevrolet, BMW, Audi, Volkswagen, Hyundai, Kia, Mazda, Nissan, Lexus, Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep, Ram, Subaru, Mitsubishi, Infiniti, Acura, Cadillac, Lincoln, and more. If you don't see your vehicle, just call Kobe — we likely still support it.
Yes! We duplicate most condo fobs and parking garage access cards for $10 if you come to us. If you need us to come to your location, there is a $40 service charge on top. Some newer buildings use fully encrypted fobs — text us a photo of your fob first and we'll confirm compatibility right away before coming out.
Garage remote cloning and programming is $40 if you come to us. If you need us to come to your location, there is an additional $40 service charge. We support most major brands including LiftMaster, Chamberlain, Genie, Marantec, and more. Call or text us the brand of your opener and we'll confirm before coming out.
Most jobs are same-day. We serve Vaughan, Woodbridge, Mississauga, Brampton, North York, Richmond Hill, Markham, Scarborough, Toronto, and surrounding GTA areas. Call or text Kobe to get a time estimate for your area.
We accept credit/debit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay, Google Pay, Interac e-Transfer, and cash. We bring a wireless reader to every job. All card payments are processed securely through Stripe.
Yes. We operate 7 days a week, including weekends and evenings. Call or text Kobe at 289-946-3846 to confirm availability for your time slot.
